final:
// // This module decrements its value on the negative edge of the clock signal (CLK) when the disable signal is low. If the reset signal (RST) is active, the counter is incremented to maximum. The counter's current value is output on the count_out bus.
module top_module(
    input CLK,
    input RST,
    input enable,
    output reg [3:0] count_out
);always @(posedge CLK) begin
    if (RST) begin
        count_out <= 4'b0;
    end else if (enable) begin
        count_out <= count_out + 4'b1;
    end
end

endmodule
